custom_paths.description: List of paths to search for wallpapers.

backend.description: Wallpaper backend, requires 'wallpaper.<backend>.sh' as handler script in $PATH

strength.description: Sets both X & Y parallax strength.

active_delay.description: Delay (ms) before animation starts after mouse enters wallpaper surface.

model.description: ONNX depth model: depth-anything-v3-base, midas-small, depth-pro-q4.

regenerate.description: Forces regeneration of depth maps & meshes.

column_count.description: Number of columns for wallpaper selector.
Number of columns for theme selector.

execute.description: Commands to execute for battery notifications.

low.description: Command to execute when battery is low.

critical.description: Command to execute when battery is critical.

line.description: Number of lines for keybind hints.

tesseract_languages.description: Place desired languages to use for text recognition. To see installed languages run `tesseract --list-langs`.

skip_template.description: Templates to skip when using wallbash.

position.description: A fallback position of the waybar.

show_icon.description: Show the weather icon in waybar.

show_today.description: Show detailed description of today in tooltip.

forecast_days.description: Number of days to show forecast (0-3).

location.description: Location/coordinates string for the weather output.

sanitize.description: List of regex to sanitize in the theme.config.

steps.description: Number of steps to increase/decrease volume.
Number of steps to increase/decrease brightness.

hide_cursor.description: Hides the cursor instead of making it visible.

ignore_empty_input.description: Skips validation when no password is provided.

immediate_render.description: Makes hyprlock immediately start to draw widgets.

text_trim.description: Sets if the text should be trimmed, useful to avoid trailing newline in commands output.

fractional_scaling.description: Whether to use fractional scaling. 0: disabled, 1: enabled, 2: auto.

screencopy_mode.description: Selects screencopy mode: 0 gpu accelerated, 1 cpu based (slow).

fail_timeout.description: Milliseconds until the UI resets after a failed auth attempt.

desktop.description: Generic desktop/compositor configuration. Compositor-agnostic counterpart to [hyprland]; use this for cross-compositor support (Hyprland, Sway, niri, etc.).

dbus_share_picker.default: dbus-update-activation-environment --systemd WAYLAND_DISPLAY XDG_CURRENT_DESKTOP XDG_SESSION_TYPE XDG_SESSION_DESKTOP XDG_CONFIG_HOME QT_QPA_PLATFORMTHEME

systemd_share_picker.default: systemctl --user import-environment WAYLAND_DISPLAY XDG_CURRENT_DESKTOP XDG_SESSION_TYPE XDG_SESSION_DESKTOP XDG_CONFIG_HOME QT_QPA_PLATFORMTHEME

text_clipboard.default: hyde-shell app -u hyde-$XDG_SESSION_DESKTOP-text-clipboard.service -t service wl-paste --type text --watch cliphist store

image_clipboard.default: hyde-shell app -u hyde-$XDG_SESSION_DESKTOP-image-clipboard.service -t service wl-paste --type image --watch cliphist store

desktop.start.description: Generic desktop autostart configuration. Compositor-agnostic counterpart to [hyprland-start]; use this for cross-compositor support (Hyprland, Sway, niri, etc.).

dbus_share_picker.default: dbus-update-activation-environment --systemd WAYLAND_DISPLAY XDG_CURRENT_DESKTOP XDG_SESSION_TYPE XDG_SESSION_DESKTOP XDG_CONFIG_HOME QT_QPA_PLATFORMTHEME
dbus_share_picker.description: DBus share picker (for XDG portal / XDPH).

systemd_share_picker.default: systemctl --user import-environment WAYLAND_DISPLAY XDG_CURRENT_DESKTOP XDG_SESSION_TYPE XDG_SESSION_DESKTOP XDG_CONFIG_HOME QT_QPA_PLATFORMTHEME
systemd_share_picker.description: Systemd share picker (for XDG portal / XDPH).

text_clipboard.default: hyde-shell app -u hyde-$XDG_SESSION_DESKTOP-text-clipboard.service -t service wl-paste --type text --watch cliphist store

image_clipboard.default: hyde-shell app -u hyde-$XDG_SESSION_DESKTOP-image-clipboard.service -t service wl-paste --type image --watch cliphist store

max_length.description: Max length of song and artist string.

artist_track_separator.description: Separator symbols to display between artist and track.
